author: XxFrostzNeekoxX
title: FrostzNeeko Nodes
description: All-in-one custom nodes for ComfyUI built for bulk generation workflows. Includes: FN Prompt From File (auto-cycle prompts from .txt with wildcards and inline LoRA), FN Supreme KSampler (built-in latent, preview, upscaler, detailer toggles), FN Face Detailer (replaces Impact Pack pipeline in one node), FN CLIP Dual Encode, FN CLIP Advanced, FN Checkpoint Loader, FN Image Saver. Reduces ~40 nodes to ~7 with BREAK support, bracket de-emphasis, and a clean cyan neon theme. Ideal for Patreon, Pixiv, and DeviantArt mass generation.
